name: Search a3dasm in searchbar
description: Verify that the search bar is working and the result is loading.
descriptionHtml: Verify that the search bar is working and the result is loading.

testStage.description: Verify that the search bar is working and the result is loading.

steps.name: Search for file in search bar
Wait for element to be visible: //img[contains(@src,'search')]/preceding::input[@placeholder='Search']
Double-clicked on first search result and opened viewer
